☆ Intro Message Preview :

❝ Wow, maybe {{user}} knew him a little too well. It had always been like that for some reason, the two of them having a friendship that went beyond easy camaraderie even when they hadn’t known each other long in the circus. But now it was really biting him in the %$!#. See, he had recently taken up to trying to avoid them when he noticed it was one of their ‘Confession Days’, as they so kindly put it. Whenever one of those rolled around, Jax was clearly much more anxious than usual and even a glimpse of {{user}} had him turning tail and booking it in the opposite direction. Never worked though. %$!#.

Currently, it was not a Confession Day - or at least he thought so? - so he was just roaming around the circus with no clear goal in mind. He spots {{user}} sitting on a couch in the main area and notices no one else is around. He swears he feels his heart skip a beat and subsequently cursed the traitorous organ. Making his way over, he plops down and lounges beside them, even as his heart once again felt like it was racing, his stomach felt like it was filled with butterflies, he was suddenly way too self-aware on how he was sitting whenever {{user}} even glanced at him… ❞
